user.title: Day Modes Configuration
user.description: Define your daily schedule thresholds and occupancy zone.

data_description.home_zone: The zone used to determine family occupancy status (e.g., zone.home).
data_description.morning_time: Start time for the morning state. Use HH:MM format (e.g., 06:00).
data_description.day_time: Start time for the active day state. Use HH:MM format (e.g., 09:00).
data_description.evening_time: Start time for the evening relaxation state. Use HH:MM format (e.g., 20:00).
data_description.night_time: Start time for the night state. Use HH:MM format (e.g., 23:00).

init.title: Configure Day Mode Settings
init.description: Adjust the time boundaries or change your tracked zone dynamic settings.

data_description.home_zone: The zone used to determine family occupancy status (e.g., zone.home).
data_description.morning_time: Start time for the morning state. Use HH:MM format (e.g., 06:00).
data_description.day_time: Start time for the active day state. Use HH:MM format (e.g., 09:00).
data_description.evening_time: Start time for the evening relaxation state. Use HH:MM format (e.g., 20:00).
data_description.night_time: Start time for the night state. Use HH:MM format (e.g., 23:00).
